description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure dressed in long, layered robes and a rounded hat, reminiscent of historical or religious attire. The figure's right arm is extended forward with the hand slightly open, while the left arm holds a rectangular object, possibly a book or tablet, against the body. The surface of the sculpture is highly glossy, with a metallic gold finish that reflects light and accentuates the folds and details of the clothing. The back of the figure reveals a deep vertical recess in the robe, exposing a dark, textured interior. The facial features are finely detailed, with a contemplative expression and a well-defined beard. The sculpture stands on a small, rectangular base, suggesting it is designed for display in a public or ceremonial space.
description: A glossy gold sculpture of a robed male figure with a hat, holding a book and extending one hand forward. The piece features detailed facial features and a deep recess in the back of the robe.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the figure's face, extended right hand, and the book held in the left arm.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the face, the outstretched right arm, and the layered robe details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the deep vertical recess in the back of the robe and the back of the head and hat.
description_view_3: Back-side angle showing the recess in the robe and the extended right arm from behind.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure in historical or religious attire
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and white.
